steps.title: Separate first and later days
steps.content: The first day costs $72n$. For $x$ total days, there are $x-1$ additional days, each costing $36n$.

steps.title: Build and simplify the cost
steps.content:
Add the first-day cost and the additional-day costs.
$$72n+36n(x-1)$$
$$72n+36nx-36n=36nx+36n$$

steps.title: Check the first day
steps.content:
When $x=1$, the simplified function gives
$$36n(1)+36n=72n$$
which matches the first-day cost. The answer is A.
